usecases.audience: AI product builders and design-led founders evaluating whether Vulca can turn design memory into production-grade code-generated PPT.
usecases.business_decision: Should the team position Vulca as a design-to-production presentation workflow rather than a prompt-only slide generator?
usecases.deck_mission: Show that the product selects data, memory, modules, and QA gates before writing slide code.
must_not_show: do not copy Figma brand visuals
do not copy Figma product UI
do not become a feature grid
do not borrow source brand color identity
usecases.visual_risk: Can drift into Figma-like branding or generic product grid if source-brand sanitization is weak.
workflow_implications: select theme and spacing policy before production modules
usecases.qa_probe: From the contact sheet, the full arm should read as a designed workflow product, not a source-brand imitation or report.

usecases.audience: Product, growth, and platform teams who need a keynote-style narrative for a technical fintech capability without turning the deck into a product catalogue.
usecases.business_decision: Should the deck sell a specific commercial shift by staging one memorable product demo instead of listing every shipped feature?
usecases.deck_mission: Compress a broad product launch into a keynote route where one demo-scale action proves the business value.
must_show: product breadth only as supporting context
must_not_show: do not copy Stripe brand visuals
do not copy Stripe event graphics
do not flatten into a feature grid
do not use source brand marks or copied transcript text
failure_modes: too many product tiles compete with the main demo
financial complexity becomes a table dump
the narrative reads like a changelog instead of a commercial keynote
usecases.visual_risk: Fintech references can produce dense grids, badges, or default charts unless the workflow selects a climax object and density budget first.
workflow_implications: select trust boundary and benchmark probes before final QA
usecases.qa_probe: From the contact sheet, the full arm should show one commercial proof route rather than a spreadsheet of features.

usecases.audience: Enterprise AI buyers and technical executives deciding whether a platform story feels credible, large-scale, and grounded in a concrete demo path.
usecases.business_decision: Should the product narrative prioritize a credible AI platform transformation over a list of model announcements?
usecases.deck_mission: Turn a wide AI platform story into a staged demo with a clear climax, infrastructure credibility, and business outcome.
must_not_show: do not copy Google brand visuals
do not copy Google Cloud event graphics
do not build a logo wall
do not use source brand colors as the theme
failure_modes: demo scale is too small for an enterprise keynote
too many technical terms crowd the slide
usecases.visual_risk: Cloud keynotes can default to broad announcement grids; the workflow must force a demo climax and route secondary evidence away from the main canvas.
usecases.qa_probe: From the contact sheet, the full arm should show a readable AI demo climax with enterprise scale, not an announcement inventory.

usecases.audience: Design leaders and product teams evaluating whether a new design language can be explained as an interaction system, not only an aesthetic surface.
usecases.business_decision: Should the presentation make a design language credible by showing material behavior, interaction hierarchy, and adoption constraints?
usecases.deck_mission: Show a design language as a product system with material rules, content focus, and implementation boundaries.
must_show: material behavior translated into native editable objects
must_not_show: do not copy Apple brand visuals
do not copy Apple UI or Liquid Glass screenshots
do not imitate Apple keynote composition
do not use source brand marks or source prose
failure_modes: presentation becomes an Apple-style imitation instead of a Vulca-native proof
usecases.visual_risk: Design-language references are high-risk for brand imitation; the workflow must abstract behavior rules and generate an original theme.
workflow_implications: select source-brand sanitization before public review
usecases.qa_probe: From the contact sheet, the full arm should read as an original design-system explanation with no Apple-like brand identity.
